work.title: HDFC Securities
accomplishment: Successfully onboarded multiple Java, Go, and React-based applications onto AWS and Kubernetes platforms, standardizing deployment processes.
Designed and maintained GitLab CI/CD pipelines for containerized, serverless, and static web applications, reducing deployment effort and improving release consistency.
Implemented GitOps-based deployment workflows using ArgoCD, improving deployment reliability and rollback capabilities.
Optimized EKS cluster resource utilization using Karpenter and OpenCost, improving infrastructure efficiency and cost visibility.
Established centralized observability using OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana, and Elastic APM for proactive monitoring and troubleshooting.
Implemented secure secret management using AWS Secrets Manager and Kubernetes External Secrets, enhancing security compliance.
Managed Elasticsearch clusters, backup policies, index lifecycle management, dashboards, alerts, and APM monitoring.
Conducted Disaster Recovery (DR) drills and validated application recovery procedures to ensure business continuity.
Strengthened platform security through Keycloak, ARCON, IAM role-based access controls, WAF policies, and Multi-Factor Authentication (2FA).
Automated infrastructure provisioning and configuration management using AWS CloudFormation and AWS-native automation services.
Improved application scalability and traffic management using Istio service mesh, Gateway API, and AWS Load Balancer Controllers.
Supported and optimized serverless workloads using AWS Lambda, API Gateway, EventBridge, SNS, and SQS integrations.
Led troubleshooting of production incidents involving Kubernetes, AWS networking, databases, and application connectivity, reducing Mean Time to Resolution (MTTR).

Roles & Specialties: Administrator of AWS, Kubernetes, and GitLab
Elasticsearch, Monitoring, and Logging Platforms Administrator

Application Support & Onboarding: Onboard and support backend (Go, Java) and frontend (React, S3-hosted, Kubernetes-hosted) applications.
Collaborate with development, security, and operations teams to ensure platform reliability and compliance.

Kubernetes & Platform Services: Manage Kubernetes clusters, networking, service mesh, ingress, and platform services.
Perform server patching, upgrades, and security hardening activities.

Infrastructure & Incident Management: Troubleshoot infrastructure, application, database, and connectivity issues across AWS environments.
Maintain observability, monitoring, alerting, and incident response workflows.

Security & Access Control: Manage access control, authentication, authorization, and privileged access systems.

Disaster Recovery: Execute Disaster Recovery (DR) drills and validate recovery processes.

work.title: SKUAD.IO (ALL REMOTE)
accomplishment: Established an end-to-end disaster recovery plan using Cloud CLI and Helm chart.
Reduced expenses by 27% through strategic cost optimization.
Monitored different levels of metrics using Prometheus and set up critical alert triggers via PagerDuty, improving reaction time by 70%.
Implemented automated commit linking to JIRA, reducing tracking efforts by 60%.
Successfully migrated the entire cluster from Mumbai to Singapore.
Provisioned GitLab Runner through Terraform, reducing setup time by 80% and enabling concurrent execution.
Upgraded to Istio from ingress, cutting costs by 30% while enhancing security and performance.
Resolved a database blackout downtime in 20 minutes using backups.

Roles & Specialties: Kafka, Database, and Linux Server Administration

Kubernetes Cluster Administration: Designed and provisioned secure Kubernetes clusters across development, staging, and production environments.
Enforced strict security protocols by configuring Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) and user permissions.
Deployed microservices (Node.js, React, Python) using Helm charts and automated ArgoCD GitOps pipelines.
Automated SSL/TLS certificate management using cert-manager integrated with Let's Encrypt.
Optimized multi-tenant clusters using namespace segregation, taints, tolerations, and node affinities.
Configured advanced routing, traffic shaping, and service discovery via Istio Service Mesh (VirtualServices, Gateways).
Scheduled and managed automated background jobs utilizing Kubernetes CronJobs.
Configured self-healing mechanisms, including liveness and readiness probes, to maintain 100% service uptime.
Deployed distributed logging, metrics, and APM tools including Loki, Prometheus, Grafana, and SonarQube.
Managed GitLab runners dynamically provisioned inside GKE/EKS clusters.

Database Administration: Implemented dynamic and role-based data masking in PostgreSQL to protect sensitive user information.
Streamlined database access request workflows using secure Notion-integrated forms.
Developed and tested disaster recovery backup, replication, and point-in-time recovery processes.
Managed MongoDB deployments, overseeing replica set configuration, backups, and data restorations.
Orchestrated large-scale database migrations to MongoDB Atlas with minimal downtime.

ELK Logging Stack: Built centralized logging pipelines using the ELK (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) stack.
Deployed ELK components on Kubernetes clusters with custom resource limits and storage classes.
Created custom Logstash filters and Elasticsearch index lifecycle management (ILM) policies to optimize retention.

GitLab CI/CD & Version Control: Authored and optimized highly concurrent GitLab CI/CD pipeline configurations.
Standardized pipeline templates across all repositories to reduce development friction.
Implemented branch-based deployment strategies and automated credential injection.
Configured isolated development/testing environments on Vercel for previewing branch deployments.
Integrated automated code analysis steps (SonarQube, security scanning) directly into developer merge requests.

GCP Cloud Platform: Managed global Cloud DNS, firewall policies, VPCs, and Compute Engine virtual machines.
Managed highly available Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) clusters and custom node pools.
Configured GCP Pub/Sub messaging queues and Memorystore (Redis) caching instances.
Deployed and configured Pritunl VPN access to secure cloud resource networks.
Integrated OpenLDAP for unified identity and access management across cloud resources.

Infrastructure & Configuration Managemen: Optimized cloud spend through right-sizing resources, cleanup scripts, and autoscaling policies.
Authored detailed disaster recovery manuals, targeting a recovery time objective (RTO) under 4 hours.
Configured and monitored distributed Kafka clusters on Confluent Cloud.
Managed Cloudflare configurations, including DNS records, page rules, and Web Application Firewall (WAF) proxies.
Defined infrastructure as code using Terraform to ensure reproducible and trackable cloud provisioning.

work.title: OMUNI (ARVIND LIMITED)
accomplishment: Implemented a highly available K8s cluster using Kops, achieving 99.99% uptime.
Established a CI/CD pipeline with Jenkins for deploying Java Spring Boot, Node.js, and Python applications, reducing release times by 50%.
Utilized AWS Lambda functions to schedule downtime and perform database cleanup.
Conducted scans on all servers using Nessus, remediating 98% of vulnerabilities to meet SOC2 compliance.
Set up a 7-day restoration and backup strategy for RDS and EC2 using Terraform.
Implemented lifecycle policies for Amazon S3, reducing storage costs by 40%.
Resolved AEM issues using troubleshooting skills, enabling the go-live of nnnow.com within 2 hours.

Kubernetes Administration: Managed and maintained deployment of 97+ microservices over the Kubernetes cluster.
Maintained 99.99% cluster uptime using highly available multi-master nodes.
Scaled worker nodes and configured Horizontal Pod Autoscalers (HPA) during high-traffic peak sale events.
Created and isolated new namespaces and microservices testing environments.
Configured deployments, services, virtual services, and gateways utilizing Istio service mesh.
Managed weekly sprint deployment releases securely and efficiently.
Monitored individual microservice performance and health using Prometheus and Grafana.

AWS Cloud Infrastructure: Managed AWS services including ELB (Elastic Load Balancers), ASG (Auto Scaling Groups), EBS volumes, and EC2 instances.
Provisioned EC2 servers on demand with custom security groups, key pairs, and EBS storage.
Administered networking components: VPCs, subnets, route tables, Elastic IPs, NAT Gateways, Internet Gateways, and VPC Peering.
Created, optimized, and maintained Amazon RDS instances.
Authored and deployed event-driven Python functions using AWS Lambda.
Managed custom domains, DNS records, and routing rules using AWS Route 53.
Managed AWS S3 bucket structures, lifecycle policies, and access controls.
Administered SQS queues, ElastiCache (Redis), CloudWatch metrics, and CloudTrail audit logs.

Jenkins CI/CD Automation: Designed and optimized CI/CD pipeline automation for continuous integration and deployments.
Developed housekeeping pipelines for system cleanup and workspace recycling.
Configured user access control, build parameters, and build trigger schedules in Jenkins.
Containerized Spring Boot, Node.js, and Python microservices within automated Jenkins pipelines.

Database Administration: Administered SQL, NoSQL, and MongoDB databases, managing tables, collections, indices, and database triggers.
Configured database user accounts and defined strict access control permissions.
Monitored database size, growth, and disk storage limits.
Scheduled database cleanup tasks using cron scripts and AWS Lambda.
Monitored server health metrics: CPU utilization, memory usage, and I/O operations.
Ensured database connection strings and security groups complied with organization safety standards.

Linux Server Administration: Optimized CPU, memory usage, and system performance on host machines.
Patched server packages to resolve CVEs and server vulnerabilities.
Managed local Linux users, groups, and directory permission levels.
Managed disk space, partitioning, and remote volume mounting.
Tracked and optimized system processes and active network ports.
Configured secure remote shell (SSH) key access protocols for team members.
Maintained secure file transfer protocols (SCP/SFTP) on dedicated gateway servers.
Managed renewals and configurations for SSL certificates, OpenVPN profiles, and Nessus scan licenses.

Version Control Systems: Created and managed groups, projects, and repositories in Bitbucket and GitLab.
Enforced branch protection rules and access permissions for developer workspaces.

Monitoring and Log Management: Monitored all Linux servers using customized Prometheus exporters and Grafana dashboards.
Redesigned and deployed the ELK stack inside the Kubernetes cluster for centralized logging.
Configured alerts for critical system thresholds (CPU, Memory, Disk, endpoint checks).
Configured Elasticsearch backups, archiving historical logs into long-term AWS S3 storage.
Upgraded and configured Pinpoint APM software for tracking application level transaction metrics.

Proxy & Web Application Firewall: Configured and maintained Nginx and Apache web server configurations (forward and reverse proxies).
Set up Squid proxy servers to control and whitelist outgoing container network traffic.
Analyzed traffic logs to detect anomalies and blocked malicious traffic patterns using Indusface WAF.

Windows Server Administration: Managed storage expansions and volume restorations from backups on Windows hosts.
Monitored network traffic and managed Remote Desktop (RDP) access security.

DevOps Team Leadership: Prioritized, organized, and assigned tasks to DevOps engineers.
Led and mentored a team of 5 DevOps engineers, assisting them with blockers.
Conducted technical interviews and trained new hires.
Authored SOP (Standard Operating Procedure) documentation to standardize team procedures.

Security Compliance & Support: Investigated and resolved customer-reported production issues.
Collaborated with developers to troubleshoot and debug complex application bugs.
Drafted comprehensive post-incident Root Cause Analysis (RCA) reports.
Participated in compliance audits for SOC2 certification.

Other Technical Tasks: Managed access controls for OpenVPN, FreeIPA bastion hosts, and Jenkins workspaces.
Developed Ansible playbooks and Terraform files for automated provisioning.
Administered highly available clusters of Kafka (3 nodes) and RabbitMQ (3 nodes).
Managed Kafka topics and RabbitMQ queues.
Optimized Dockerfiles for multi-stage builds to minimize image size.
